title: Granite Pestle only Replacement - Pestle only Stone Unpolished Heavy Granite Large Capacity Spice Grinder 6.5"(Not Included Mortar)
description:
About this item
A Kitchen Necessity: Nice2Mitu pestle set has been used for thousands of years as the way to crush, grind and powder herbs and dry spices. The age-old, durable, traditional manual grinding method ensures that all cooking ingredients bring out their full flavor and aroma profiles, allowing you to further control their texture and make delicious dishes
Professional Design: Made of unpolished granite, which is inherently durable and heavy, The inherent character of the granite is that it will provide the metate-like natural friction, allowing you crush your ingredients into powder quickly
Powerful: Allowing you grind all your food quickly. Our pestle offers powerful grip, gliding across your mortar’s interior, without the need of excess hand motions
Enjoy Your Life: This pestle set allows make a delicious dish for your families. You may need to spend 15 minutes on crushing your ingredient. But your families can feel your warm love and your life will be more colorful because of the love you give to your families
Effortless Cleaning: After use, just rinse the pestle with a sponge soaked thoroughly in warm water and let it dry
reviews_5s:
